meaning: n.萨克福马(英国役马,矮壮,栗色),萨福克羊(英国种上等食用羊,无角,首、足皆黑色)
examples: They created what was called the Suffolk System in 1819.
So the Suffolk Bank became a banker's bank and it lasted until 1860.
Charles Kindregan, a law professor at Suffolk University in Boston, argued.
Mr Taylor, from Wakefield, was arrested after a three-year investigation by Suffolk Trading Standards.
This is the sliding house, designed by dRMM architects and constructed in Suffolk, England.
